narration: Genes are read into messenger RNA before proteins are built.
visual_description: Hook visual: Genes are read into messenger RNA before proteins are built.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Genes are read into messenger RNA before proteins are built.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Genes are read into messenger RNA before proteins are built.

narration: This process, called transcription, is the first step in protein synthesis.
visual_description: Context visual: This process, called transcription, is the first step in protein synthesis.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This process, called transcription, is the first step in protein synthesis.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This process, called transcription, is the first step in protein synthesis.

narration: But how does the DNA know what to say? It’s all in the sequence!
visual_description: Pattern Interrupt visual: But how does the DNA know what to say? It’s all in the sequence!
ai_image_prompt: Pattern Interrupt visual: But how does the DNA know what to say? It’s all in the sequence!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Pattern Interrupt visual: But how does the DNA know what to say? It’s all in the sequence!

narration: RNA polymerase reads the DNA strand and builds a complementary RNA strand.
visual_description: Escalation visual: RNA polymerase reads the DNA strand and builds a complementary RNA strand.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: RNA polymerase reads the DNA strand and builds a complementary RNA strand.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: RNA polymerase reads the DNA strand and builds a complementary RNA strand.

narration: This RNA strand carries the genetic instructions from the nucleus to the ribosomes.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This RNA strand carries the genetic instructions from the nucleus to the ribosomes.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This RNA strand carries the genetic instructions from the nucleus to the ribosomes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This RNA strand carries the genetic instructions from the nucleus to the ribosomes.

narration: And that's how your body reads its blueprints to create proteins!
visual_description: Payoff visual: And that's how your body reads its blueprints to create proteins!
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: And that's how your body reads its blueprints to create proteins!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: And that's how your body reads its blueprints to create proteins!
